name: Lopus AI
long_description:
Unicorns don't build dashboards
For them, decision speed is everything. 
But dashboards are often slow, static, and stale.
They need an AI that will answer their questions quickly and accurately.

Pointing an AI at all your data is a recipe for disaster - it will confidently lie, hallucinate, and drive your business into the ground.

What if you could trust your AI the way you trust a calculator?

That's Lopus.

We build a self-healing semantic layer that captures your business logic.
Every metric. Every definition. Every edge case.
Defined once. Trusted everywhere.
Now AI has the context it needs to answer accurately.

No SQL. No dashboards. No waiting on the data team.
